airbnb.title: Deep cleaning
airbnb.description: Give your space a complete and thorough cleaning with a professional, meticulous, and premium service, including interior and exterior surface care, cleaning of hard-to-reach areas, and detailed treatment of each room. All our services are fully customizable based on your needs and the specifics of your space. Certain conditions may apply depending on the level of maintenance required.

Interior cleaning of cabinets and drawers
High areas (tops of cabinets, light fixtures, vents)
Cleaning of doors, frames, and moldings
Washing and folding sheets and clothes
Interior and exterior cleaning of garbage and recycling bins

airbnbCleaning.title: Airbnb cleaning

features: Kitchen, bathroom, and common area cleaning

staffing.title: Dedicated maintenance staff

moveRenovation.title: Post-construction and move-out cleaning
moveRenovation.description: A specialized service designed to restore your spaces to an impeccable condition after moving or construction work. Our teams work with precision to remove residue, dust, and marks left behind by the work, so you can enjoy a clean, healthy space ready for occupancy.
features: Complete removal of construction dust (walls, ceilings, surfaces)
Deep cleaning of surfaces, corners, and hard-to-reach areas
Full washing of floors, baseboards, and stairs
Interior cleaning of cabinets, drawers, and storage spaces
Cleaning of doors, handles, switches, and frames
Detailed finishing for a move-in-ready space
Final inspection to ensure an impeccable result

about.title: About Mr Clean+
about.subtitle: Your trusted cleaning partner in Montreal
about.description: Mr Clean+ is a professional cleaning company serving Montreal, Laval, the North Shore and the South Shore. We offer reliable services tailored to residential and commercial needs. Our team consists of trained, rigorous and trustworthy professionals committed to delivering consistent, high-quality results at every visit.
about.companyDescription: Provides professional cleaning services for residential and commercial sectors, with a rigorous, reliable and client-focused approach. Our qualified team ensures a clean, healthy and spotless environment through effective methods and professional products adapted to each surface, while guaranteeing consistent, high-quality service in Montreal, Laval, on the North Shore and South Shore.

about.engagementText: At Mr Clean+, every job is done with care, precision and discretion. We respect your spaces and your schedule, and we make sure the results always meet your expectations.

faq.title: FAQ - Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Here are the most common questions about our cleaning services.
faq.ctaText: Our team can guide you based on your residential or commercial needs.

items.question: How are your prices calculated?
items.answer: Our prices are based on the size of the space, the type of service, and the level of cleaning required. We provide a clear, free, no-obligation quote based on your availability before any intervention.

items.question: What is regular cleaning?
items.answer: Regular cleaning is a recurring maintenance service for your home or business, performed at the frequency of your choice (weekly, biweekly, monthly, or one-time). It includes cleaning essential areas such as the kitchen, bathroom, living room, and bedrooms, including dusting, surface care, vacuuming, and floor washing. This service is ideal to maintain a clean, healthy, and consistently well-kept environment based on your needs.

items.question: What is included in a deep cleaning?
items.answer: Deep cleaning includes more detailed work on surfaces, harder-to-reach areas, and rooms that require extra time. The exact scope is confirmed with you before the visit.

items.question: Do you provide commercial cleaning for businesses and retail locations?
items.answer: Yes. We provide commercial cleaning services adapted to large spaces (IGA, Pharmaprix, supermarkets, etc.) as well as small and medium spaces such as offices, restaurants, retail stores, and other establishments. Our interventions are flexible and adjusted to your schedule so your operations are not disrupted. Services can also be performed outside business hours, based on your needs.

items.question: Do you bring your own products and equipment?
items.answer: Yes. Our team arrives with the required tools and products. If you prefer eco-friendly products or specific supplies, we can adapt.

items.question: Do I need to be home during the cleaning?
items.answer: It is not required. Many clients provide us with secure access to their home or workplace with confidence. We apply reliable procedures to ensure the security of your premises, and we agree together on the most practical option based on your preferences.

items.question: Can I reschedule or cancel an appointment?
items.answer: Yes, appointments can be rescheduled or canceled with advance notice. This helps us reorganize scheduling efficiently.

items.question: Do you serve Montreal and nearby areas?
items.answer: Yes. We serve Montreal, Laval, the North Shore, and the South Shore for both residential and commercial cleaning.

items.question: What if I am not satisfied with the result?
items.answer: Your satisfaction matters. Contact us quickly and we will review the situation and provide a fair, prompt solution.

footer.description: Professional and reliable cleaning services offered in Montreal, Laval, on the North Shore, and on the South Shore. Customer satisfaction is at the heart of our commitment.

privacyPolicy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacyPolicy.intro: This Privacy Notice for Academy Canada ("we," "us," or "our"), describes how and why we might access, collect, store, use, and/or share ("process") your personal information when you use our services ("Services"), including when you: - Visit our website at https://www.mrcleanplus.ca/ or any website of ours that links to this Privacy Notice - Use Mr Clean+, professional cleaning services. Mr Clean+ offers professional cleaning services for individuals and businesses in Montreal, Laval, North Shore, and South Shore. Our services include residential, commercial, post-move, and post-renovation cleaning, as well as regular maintenance and deep cleaning. We are committed to providing reliable, meticulous service tailored to each client's specific needs to ensure a clean, healthy, and professional environment. - Engage with us in other related ways, including any marketing or events Questions or concerns? Reading this Privacy Notice will help you understand your privacy rights and choices. We are responsible for making decisions about how your personal information is processed. If you do not agree with our policies and practices, please do not use our Services. If you still have any questions or concerns, please contact us at Monsieurcleanplus@gmail.com.
privacyPolicy.summaryText: This summary provides key points from our Privacy Notice, but you can find out more details about any of these topics by using our table of contents below to find the section you are looking for.
summaryList: What personal information do we process? When you visit, use, or navigate our Services, we may process personal information depending on how you interact with us and the Services, the choices you make, and the products and features you use.
Do we process any sensitive personal information? We do not process sensitive personal information.
Do we collect any information from third parties? We do not collect any information from third parties.

How do we process your information? We process your information to provide, improve, and administer our Services, communicate with you, for security and fraud prevention, and to comply with law. We may also process your information for other purposes only with your prior explicit consent.
In what situations and with which parties do we share personal information? We may share information in specific situations described in this section and/or with the following third parties.

How do we keep your information safe? We have adequate organizational and technical processes and procedures in place to protect your personal information. However, no electronic transmission over the internet or information storage technology can be guaranteed to be 100% secure.
What are your rights? Depending on where you are located geographically, the applicable privacy law may mean you have certain rights regarding your personal information.
How do you exercise your rights? The easiest way to exercise your rights is by contacting us. We will consider and act upon any request in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

toc.label: How do we process your information?
What legal bases do we rely on to process your information?
When and with whom do we share your personal information?
What is our stance on third-party websites?
Do we use cookies and other tracking technologies?
How long do we keep your information?
How do we keep your information safe?
Do we collect information from minors?
Do we make updates to this notice?
How can you contact us about this notice?
How can you review, update, or delete the data we collect from you?

info-collect.title: 1. WHAT INFORMATION DO WE COLLECT?
info-collect.subtitle: Personal information you disclose to us
info-collect.inShort: In Short: We collect personal information that you provide to us.
info-collect.p1: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you express an interest in obtaining information about us or our products and Services, when you participate in activities on the Services, or otherwise when you contact us.
list: Personal Information Provided by You. The personal information that we collect depends on the context of your interactions with us and the Services, the choices you make, and the products and features you use. The personal information we collect may include the following: names, phone numbers, email addresses, mailing addresses.
Sensitive Information. We do not process sensitive information.
info-collect.p2: All personal information that you provide to us must be true, complete, and accurate, and you must notify us of any changes to such personal information.

info-process.title: 2. HOW DO WE PROCESS YOUR INFORMATION?
info-process.inShort: In Short: We process your information to provide, improve, and administer our Services, communicate with you, for security and fraud prevention, and to comply with law. We may also process your information for other purposes only with your prior explicit consent.
list: To deliver and facilitate delivery of services to the user.
To respond to user inquiries/offer support to users.
To fulfill and manage your orders, payments, returns, and exchanges made through the Services.
To request feedback and contact you about your use of our Services.
To send you marketing and promotional communications, if this is in accordance with your marketing preferences.
To deliver targeted advertising to you.
To protect our Services, including fraud monitoring and prevention.
To evaluate and improve our Services, products, marketing, and your experience.
To determine the effectiveness of our marketing and promotional campaigns.
To comply with our legal obligations, respond to legal requests, and exercise, establish, or defend our legal rights.

legal-bases.title: 3. WHAT LEGAL BASES DO WE RELY ON TO PROCESS YOUR INFORMATION?
legal-bases.inShort: In Short: We only process your personal information when we believe it is necessary and we have a valid legal reason (i.e., legal basis) to do so under applicable law, like with your consent, to comply with laws, to provide you with services to enter into or fulfill our contractual obligations, to protect your rights, or to fulfill our legitimate business interests.
list: We may process your information if you have given us specific permission (express consent) to use your personal information for a specific purpose, or in situations where your permission can be inferred (implied consent). You can withdraw your consent at any time.

In some exceptional cases, we may be legally permitted under applicable law to process your information without your consent, including, for example, for investigations and fraud detection and prevention, for business transactions, for legal compliance, and other cases as required by law.

info-share.title: 4. WHEN AND WITH WHOM DO WE SHARE YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION?
info-share.inShort: In Short: We may share information in specific situations described in this section and/or with the following third parties.
list: Business Transfers: We may share or transfer your information in connection with, or during negotiations of, any merger, sale of company assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of our business to another company.
When we use Google Maps Platform APIs: We may share your information with certain Google Maps Platform APIs (e.g., Google Maps API, Places API).

third-party.title: 5. WHAT IS OUR STANCE ON THIRD-PARTY WEBSITES?
third-party.inShort: In Short: We are not responsible for the safety of any information that you share with third parties that we may link to or who advertise on our Services, but are not affiliated with, our Services.
third-party.p1: The Services may link to third-party websites, online services, or mobile applications and/or contain advertisements from third parties that are not affiliated with us and which may link to other websites, services, or applications. We cannot guarantee the safety and privacy of data you provide to any third-party websites. You should review the policies of such third parties and contact them directly to respond to your questions.

cookies.title: 6. DO WE USE COOKIES AND OTHER TRACKING TECHNOLOGIES?
cookies.inShort: In Short: We may use cookies and other tracking technologies to collect and store your information.
cookies.p1: We may use cookies and similar tracking technologies (like web beacons and pixels) to gather information when you interact with our Services. Some online tracking technologies help us maintain the security of our Services, prevent crashes, fix bugs, save your preferences, and assist with basic site functions. We also permit third parties and service providers to use online tracking technologies on our Services for analytics and advertising.

info-retain.title: 7. HOW LONG DO WE KEEP YOUR INFORMATION?
info-retain.inShort: In Short: We keep your information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Notice unless otherwise required by law.
info-retain.p1: We will only keep your personal information for as long as it is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Notice, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law. When we have no ongoing legitimate business need to process your personal information, we will either delete or anonymize such information, or, if this is not possible, then we will securely store your personal information and isolate it from any further processing until deletion is possible.

info-safe.title: 8. HOW DO WE KEEP YOUR INFORMATION SAFE?
info-safe.inShort: In Short: We aim to protect your personal information through a system of organizational and technical security measures.
info-safe.p1: We have implemented appropriate and reasonable technical and organizational security measures designed to protect the security of any personal information we process. However, no electronic transmission over the Internet or information storage technology can be guaranteed to be 100% secure, so we cannot promise or guarantee that hackers, cybercriminals, or other unauthorized third parties will not be able to defeat our security and improperly collect, access, steal, or modify your information.

minors.title: 9. DO WE COLLECT INFORMATION FROM MINORS?
minors.inShort: In Short: We do not knowingly collect data from or market to children under 18 years of age or the equivalent age as specified by law in your jurisdiction.
minors.p1: We do not knowingly collect, solicit data from, or market to children under 18 years of age or the equivalent age as specified by law in your jurisdiction, nor do we knowingly sell such personal information. If you become aware of any data we may have collected from children under age 18, please contact us at

privacy-rights.title: 10. WHAT ARE YOUR PRIVACY RIGHTS?
privacy-rights.inShort: In Short: In some regions, such as Canada, you have rights that allow you greater access to and control over your personal information. You may review, change, or terminate your account at any time, depending on your country, province, or state of residence.
privacy-rights.p1: In some regions (like Canada), you have certain rights under applicable data protection laws. These may include the right to request access and obtain a copy of your personal information, to request rectification or erasure, to restrict the processing of your personal information, to data portability, and not to be subject to automated decision-making. You can make such a request by contacting us by using the contact details provided in the section 'How can you contact us about this notice?' below.
privacy-rights.p2: We will consider and act upon any request in accordance with applicable data protection laws. If you have questions or comments about your privacy rights, you may email us at

dnt.title: 11. CONTROLS FOR DO-NOT-TRACK FEATURES
dnt.p1: Most web browsers and some mobile operating systems and mobile applications include a Do-Not-Track ('DNT') feature or setting you can activate to signal your privacy preference not to have data about your online browsing activities monitored and collected. At this stage, no uniform technology standard for recognizing and implementing DNT signals has been finalized. As such, we do not currently respond to DNT browser signals or any other mechanism that automatically communicates your choice not to be tracked online.

confidentialite.title: 12. ENGAGEMENT DE CONFIDENTIALITÉ
confidentialite.p1: At Mr Clean+, we place great importance on protecting our clients' personal information. We are committed to never selling, renting, or sharing your data with third parties without your consent, except as required by law. The information collected is used solely to provide our services and ensure effective communication with our clients. We implement appropriate security measures to protect this information against unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure.

updates.title: 13. DO WE MAKE UPDATES TO THIS NOTICE?
updates.inShort: In Short: Yes, we will update this notice as necessary to stay compliant with relevant laws.
updates.p1: We may update this Privacy Notice from time to time. The updated version will be indicated by an updated 'Revised' date at the top of this Privacy Notice. If we make material changes to this Privacy Notice, we may notify you either by prominently posting a notice of such changes or by directly sending you a notification. We encourage you to review this Privacy Notice frequently to be informed of how we are protecting your information.

contact.title: 14. HOW CAN YOU CONTACT US ABOUT THIS NOTICE?
contact.p1: If you have questions or comments about this notice, you may email us at
contact.p2: or contact us by post at:

review-update-delete.title: 15. HOW CAN YOU REVIEW, UPDATE, OR DELETE THE DATA WE COLLECT FROM YOU?
review-update-delete.p1: You have the right to request access to the personal information we collect from you, details about how we have processed it, correct inaccuracies, or delete your personal information. You may also have the right to withdraw your consent to our processing of your personal information. These rights may be limited in some circumstances by applicable law. To request to review, update, or delete your personal information, please contact us at
